description: Ownership notes in a codex, perhaps. On one side: Yaʿaqov b. Yehuda, then "It was transferred with a proper sale to the young man [...] b. Seʿadya b. [...]. The man's name and his grandfather's name are faded: possibilities include Ḥizqiya, Tiqva, Yaʿqūb, or other names entirely. On the other side: Abū l-Munā al-ʿAṭṭār and his brother Maḥfūẓ and his brother Abū l-Ḥasan al-Kātib and Abū l-Munajjā.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
